---

name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

Example:
Users cannot edit existing transactions.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to add.

Example:
Add an edit button next to each transaction.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

* [ ] Feature works as expected
* [ ] UI is updated
* [ ] Backend functionality is implemented
* [ ] No existing functionality is broken

---

## Additional Notes

Add screenshots, ideas, or implementation details here.
